explanation: This command uses wget.exe to download a file from an IP address and save it to a suspicious location. It includes the --output-document flag, which matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses wget.exe with the short form of the -O flag to save a file to a suspicious Windows directory. It includes an IP address in the URL, matching the Sigma rule's detection logic.
This command uses wget.exe with the -O flag to save a file to a suspicious location. The command line includes an IP address, which matches the Sigma rule's detection logic.
